name: M:GTA.Math.Matrix.Scaling(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
summary: Creates a matrix that scales along the x-axis, y-axis, and y-axis.

params.name: x
params.description: Scaling factor that is applied along the x-axis.

params.name: y
params.description: Scaling factor that is applied along the y-axis.

params.name: z
params.description: Scaling factor that is applied along the z-axis.
